title: Renewables and Low-Carbon Solutions
text:

Manage Subscriptions

Our Approach to Renewables and Low-Carbon Solutions

Energy resilience is complex, with renewables and low-carbon solutions requiring new strategies, capabilities, and operating models to deliver value at scale. Our renewables and low-carbon consulting teams work end to end, helping clients overcome operational challenges, secure financing, and accelerate digital and AI transformations while building resilient, future-ready businesses. Here are some of our major areas of focus.

Developing a Renewables and Low-Carbon Solutions Strategy

We help clients shape high-capital, high-return ventures across renewables and low-carbon businesses. By combining strategic validation, partner ecosystems, offtake agreements, and regulatory navigation, we guide organizations from early-stage concept through scaling and market leadership.

Optimizing Go to Market and Monetization

Our renewables and low-carbon consulting teams design commercial strategies that capture value from renewables and frontier technologies such as hydrogen, carbon capture, bioenergy, and geothermal. This includes demand and value pool modeling, market entry strategy, pricing models such as power purchase agreements (PPAs) and green premiums, and partnership and procurement strategies.

Build and Industrialization of Renewables, Nuclear, and Low-Carbon Platforms

Across renewables, nuclear, and low-carbon solutions, we support clients from strategy through deployment. We shape portfolios, prioritize investments, and accelerate asset build-out across technologies such as wind, solar, and next-generation nuclear, while strengthening supply chain resilience. The result is a disciplined, scalable platform with the capital allocation and industrial backbone needed to compete.

Operational and Organizational Excellence

To enable efficient execution at scale, we optimize construction and operations, streamline engineering, procurement, and construction (EPC) processes, and enhance asset performance. Our low-carbon consultants also redesign operating models, upskill workforces, and embed performance management to sustain long-term value.

Optimizing Renewables and Low-Carbon Project Portfolios

We use advanced tools and analytics to evaluate and prioritize investments across low-carbon solutions—from mature renewables technologies to hydrogen, biofuels, and emerging energy systems. Our approach integrates market dynamics, infrastructure readiness, policy environments, and capital requirements to support rigorous portfolio decisions.

Digital, Data, and AI Transformation

Building on BCG’s deep digital and AI expertise, we embed these technologies across the renewables value chain—from digital twins optimizing supply and demand to GenAI-enabled operations. Our renewables and low-carbon consulting approach ensures that technology investments translate into measurable business impact.

Our Products and Solutions for Renewables and Low-Carbon Strategies

We use a range of proprietary tools and solutions to help clients scale renewables and low-carbon businesses, from strategy through execution. A selection of these capabilities includes the following:

CCUS Hub Search

Interactive map matching carbon dioxide sources with storage sites to identify and prioritize new CCUS hub opportunities globally.

CCUS Hub Search

CCUS Hub Search

O&G Low-Carbon Solutions Investment Benchmark

Benchmarks how oil and gas players invest in low-carbon solutions, tracking spend, pipelines, and market trends.

O&G Low-Carbon Solutions Investment Benchmark

O&G Low-Carbon Solutions Investment Benchmark

New Energies Project Screener

Scores and forecasts new energy projects using data across hydrogen, biofuels, wind, nuclear, and gas to optimize portfolios.

New Energies Project Screener

New Energies Project Screener

Rapid Digital Assessment in Renewables

Assesses digital maturity of renewables assets against benchmarks to identify gaps and accelerate transformation.

Rapid Digital Assessment in Renewables

Rapid Digital Assessment in Renewables

Global Renewables Developer Benchmark

Benchmarks performance across the renewables value chain, from development to operations, for solar and wind.

Global Renewables Developer Benchmark

Global Renewables Developer Benchmark

Renewables Value Calculator

Estimates project value and returns to identify optimal business models and investment timing for renewables.

Renewables Value Calculator

Renewables Value Calculator

Our Center of Excellence for Renewables and Low-Carbon Solutions

Center for Energy Impact

The Center for Energy Impact (CEI) shines a light on the energy transition and what is required for the global transformation. CEI applies a holistic perspective to understanding and shaping bold responses to one of the most critical and complex challenges of our time.
